name: Plastic Easter Eggs in Egg 30pc - Spritz™
description:
Get ready for endless festive fun with the Plastic Easter Eggs In Egg 30pc from Spritz™. This set includes 30 colorful plastic eggs, perfect for egg hunts and Easter baskets. The eggs come in a convenient, reusable egg-shaped container, making storage easy. Ideal for filling with treats or small toys, these eggs are a must-have for your Easter celebrations.

Spritz™: Pops of joy that make the moment™
